code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut have = false
mut cur = 0
mut neg = false
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    have = true
  else if b == 45 and not have
    neg = true
  else
    if have
      let v = if neg
        -cur
      else
        cur
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      cur = 0
      have = false
      neg = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if have
  let v = if neg
    -cur
  else
    cur
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, v)
end

mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut cur_max = 0
mut first = true
for x in nums
  if first
    cur_max = x
    first = false
  else
    if x > cur_max
      cur_max = x
    end
  end
  maxes = list.push(maxes, cur_max)
end

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
let m = list.len(maxes)
while idx < m
  let v = match list.get(maxes, idx)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if idx == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end

println(out)
